Text: Seats held by the Australian Labor Party #across all 8 states and territories.
Seats held by the Liberal-National Coalition #across all 6 states and the Northern #Territory.
Seats held by the Australian Greens across #all 6 states.
Seats held by Pauline Hanson's One Nation #across Western Australia, Queensland, #and New South Wales.
Seats held by Independents across Victoria #and Tasmania. Both resulted from the #senators separating from their respective #parties.
Seat held by Australia's Voice, David #Pocock, Jaquie Lambie Network, and #Palmer United Australia Party each.
